Event: Roving Restaurant December 2025
Event Date: 16/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM291
Sugar Gourmet Amulet

Once every 7 sec., the unit removes all movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly and fear, and fires a magic orb at a random enemy unit. When the orb hits, it deals magic damage to the target and all enemy units in a small radius around it, equal to 40% of the targets' maximum health, and freezes them for 4 sec. For that duration, the frozen units cannot move or attack, and the cooldown of their gear and artifact abilities is increased by 4 sec. The amulet wearer also restores health equal to 60% of the damage dealt with the ability.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

Event: Roving Restaurant December 2025

First trigger: 4 sec

Cooldown: 7 secs
